fields.name: siteName
fields.label: Site Name
fields.description: Displayed in the header and footer next to the logo.

fields.name: logoImage
fields.label: Logo Image
fields.description: The clinic logo shown in the header and footer.

fields.name: ctaButtonLabel
fields.label: Header CTA Button Label
fields.description: The button in the top navigation bar (e.g. "Book Consultation").

fields.name: footerTagline
fields.label: Footer Tagline
fields.description: Short paragraph shown in the footer under the logo.

fields.name: footerCopyright
fields.label: Footer Copyright Text
fields.description: Shown at the bottom of every page (year is added automatically). E.g. "Innergy Care. All rights reserved."

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Phone Number (display)
fields.description: Formatted for display. E.g. "(786) 618-1808"

fields.name: phoneHref
fields.label: Phone Number (dial link)
fields.description: E.164 format for the tel: link. E.g. "+17866181808"

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email Address
fields.description: Shown in the footer and on the Book page.

fields.name: addressLine1
fields.label: Address — Street
fields.description: E.g. "2335 Tamiami Trl N"

fields.name: addressLine2
fields.label: Address — Suite / Unit
fields.description: E.g. "Suite 208"

fields.name: addressCityStateZip
fields.label: Address — City, State, ZIP
fields.description: E.g. "Naples, FL 34103"

fields.name: mapsUrl
fields.label: Google Maps URL
fields.description: Full URL for the 'Visit Us' card on the Book page.

fields.name: heroEyebrow
fields.label: Hero — Eyebrow Label
fields.description: Small text above the headline. E.g. "Premium Longevity Clinic"

fields.name: heroHeadline
fields.label: Hero — Headline (first part)
fields.description: The main headline text before the italic word. E.g. "Advanced Care Meets How You"

fields.name: heroHeadlineEmphasis
fields.label: Hero — Headline Italic Word
fields.description: Rendered in italic. E.g. "Actually"

fields.name: heroHeadlineSuffix
fields.label: Hero — Headline (last part)
fields.description: Text after the italic word. E.g. "Want to Feel."

fields.name: heroCta1Label
fields.label: Hero — Primary Button Label
fields.description: Dark button linking to the Book page. E.g. "Start Your Journey"

fields.name: heroCta2Label
fields.label: Hero — Secondary Button Label
fields.description: Outline button linking to Therapies page. E.g. "Explore Therapies"

fields.name: heroImageAlt
fields.label: Hero — Image Alt Text
fields.description: Describes the hero image for screen readers and SEO.

fields.name: heroBadgeLabelTop
fields.label: Hero — Floating Badge (top line)
fields.description: Small floating card on the hero image. E.g. "Precision"

fields.name: heroBadgeLabelBottom
fields.label: Hero — Floating Badge (bottom line)
fields.description: E.g. "Cellular Care"

fields.name: featureSectionHeading
fields.label: Feature Section — Heading
fields.description: Title of the 3-card section. E.g. "A Foundation of Lasting Vitality"

fields.name: features
fields.label: Feature Cards
fields.description: The three feature cards. Do not add or remove cards — just edit the content.

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Internal icon name — do not change unless instructed.

fields.name: missionQuote
fields.label: Mission Statement Blockquote
fields.description: The large quote displayed in the green box.

fields.name: overlayProtocolLabel
fields.label: Image Overlay — Protocol Label
fields.description: Gold label on the image card. E.g. "Advance Longevity Protocol"

fields.name: therapyList
fields.label: Therapy Cards
fields.description: Each card represents one service. You can add, remove, or reorder cards.

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Choose the icon displayed on the card.

fields.name: eyebrow
fields.label: Eyebrow Label
fields.description: Small label above the heading. E.g. "Get In Touch"

fields.name: appointmentCardValue
fields.label: Appointment Card — Value
fields.description: E.g. "By Appointment"

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
